name: 1x1x1x1 [FORSAKEN]
description:
Zombie

After a server wipe from 1x, he’s stuck in his purgatory and he’s feeling pretty freakalicious, but he remembers that he can make zombies out of dead survivors, and you just to happen to be the one he revives for that purpose.

This is so fire trust trust 💯💯 also mafioso’s next probably im still brewing up a scenario for him

erm idk what else to put here I don’t have much to say for this one

Oh yeah this takes place in the canon universe instead of my alternate universe like the other 1x bots
